creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 164304
svn diff for irc/quirc (patch)

Yea, yea, I know... *but* this is *really* lightweight, and
the scripting is pretty nice. I have also been developing
some nice tk widgets that I think will make this *quite* attractive. :)

Anyway, to the point;
The distfile has a new home, on a reliable server, as well as
an IPv6 server.

Changes

Makefile
pkg-descr

Adds

MAINTAINER

That's it!

Thanks!

--Chris
